- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up of an animated white cat face with large blue eyes and pink details fills most of the image.

The main subject is a stylized cartoon cat with a white face, pink inner ears, and a small pink nose and mouth. It has thick black eyebrows above large round blue eyes with dark pupils, giving a wide-eyed expression. The cat wears a pink garment visible at the bottom of the frame, with a lighter pink collar area and a small lighter patch near the right side.

The setting is unclear because the background is a plain, soft purple gradient with no visible environment details. The lighting is flat and even, typical of a digital illustration or UI element, and the camera angle appears straight-on at the cat’s face.

No important visible text detected.

This image shows a close-up, front-facing cartoon cat character with blue eyes and pink accents. The background is a simple purple gradient with no other objects visible.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
